canonical_definition: Large language model (gpt-3.5-turbo) used to reason about candidate class names based on visual attribute descriptions and internal world knowledge.
papers: Democratizing Fine-grained Visual Recognition with Large Language Models
VDC: Versatile Data Cleanser based on Visual-Linguistic Inconsistency by Multimodal Large Language Models
